name: code-read
description: Read function/class/interface/type definitions with full body from Python, JavaScript, or TypeScript files, replacing grep-n+sed-n or nl -ba|sed -n chains for finding definition bodies.

parameters.name: --name
parameters.description: Function/class/interface name to find (supports substring match)

parameters.name: --lang
parameters.description: Language mode: py (default), js, ts, or auto (auto-detect from extension)

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show first N lines of output

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N lines of output

parameters.name: --context
parameters.description: Show N context lines before definition

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Specific files to search (default: all *.py or *.js/*.ts recursively)

examples.expected: Full body of get_stats function from Python files under /app
Full body of confirmDelete function from JS files under /app/static

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses grep -n for definition + sed -n to read body chains into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per definition lookup; JS/TS support removes need to switch to grep-search for non-Python files.
